title: Hypermotility Absorption Block
description: Aloe vera gel contains anthraquinones that dramatically accelerate intestinal peristalsis and bowel transit times, flushing oral medications out of the GI tract before complete systemic absorption can occur.
clinicalAdvice: Stagger administration times. Instruct patients to take modern oral tablet regimens at least 2 hours before or after drinking Aloe vera laxative juices.
